doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Hi, Dr. Lee. I've been having some trouble breathing for the last couple of days. It feels like I can't take a deep breath, and I've been really tired with some muscle aches. I also noticed I've lost my sense of taste and smell.

doctor_turn: Has the difficulty in breathing changed at all since it started?
patient_turn: Yes, it has definitely gotten worse. At first, it was just a little hard to take deep breaths, but now it feels like I have to put in a lot more effort to breathe.

doctor_turn: Can you describe where you feel the difficulty in breathing?
patient_turn: It feels like it's mostly in my chest, but it's more about the effort to breathe rather than any specific pain. Just a general tightness, I guess.

doctor_turn: What does the difficulty in breathing feel like for you?
patient_turn: It feels like I can't get enough air when I try to take a deep breath. It's kind of uncomfortable, and I feel like I have to work harder to breathe than usual.

doctor_turn: When did you first notice this difficulty in breathing?
When did you first notice this difficulty in breathing?
patient_turn: I first noticed it about two or three days ago.

doctor_turn: Has the difficulty in breathing changed since it first started?
patient_turn: Yes, it has definitely gotten worse since it started. It was mild at first, but now it feels like I have to work much harder to breathe.

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any cough or sore throat along with your breathing difficulties?
patient_turn: Yes, I have a mild sore throat and I've started to develop a dry cough as well.

doctor_turn: Have you felt feverish or experienced any chills recently?
patient_turn: I've felt hot to the touch, so I think I might have a fever, but I haven't had any chills.

doctor_turn: Have you had any nausea or vomiting lately?
patient_turn: No, I haven't had any nausea or vomiting at all.

doctor_turn: Have you traveled outside the province in the last few weeks?
patient_turn: No, I haven't traveled outside the province recently.

doctor_turn: What does a typical week look like for you in terms of work and social activities?
patient_turn: I mostly work from home as a financial advisor, so my days are pretty quiet with minimal client contact lately. Socially, I usually have a few drinks on the weekends, and I recently spent some time with my grandchildren, one of whom had a cold.
